actions.value:
1) On a computer, Go to Github here: https://github.com/Jacobbubble/airbitz-wallet-recovery (on a desktop computer)

---Download ZIP --> Open ZIP file --> Open SRC Folder --> Open index.html 

2) Enter the private seed that you got earlier from Airbitz

3) Click the 3 vertical dots on the top right and set index to 500 for example might be a good start (or higher depending how many tx's)

4) Click on Load Seed

5) This will generate every address as well as the private keys. Enter or search for the address in the search bar or go through the pages

6) Find the address that the funds are on and reveal the private key QR code on the right column

7) On Edge create a NEW account

8) Go inside your BTC Wallet on Edge and tap on Send to open the camera

9) Scan the private key QR Code that has the BTC funds and import

10) The funds will arrive into your Edge wallet where it shouldn't crash anymore since it is now a single non mining transaction
